title: ONT long-read sequencing of rhizosphere metagenome: ACT pot trial, river soil, planted, biofertiliser, R01
design_description: Shotgun metagenomic DNA libraries from soil and rhizosphere (rhizosheath) samples were extracted with the QIAGEN DNeasy PowerSoil Pro kit, prepared with the ONT Native Barcoding Kit 96 V14 (SQK-NBD114.96) using end-prep and ligation, pooled and sequenced on an ONT PromethION, then basecalled and demultiplexed with Dorado v1.1.1 in super-accurate (sup) mode and quality filtered (median Q>=15, length >=300bp).
